name: harness-engineering
description: Create, diagnose, and archive restartable coding-agent harnesses.

interface.shortDescription: Create, diagnose, and archive agent harnesses.
interface.longDescription: Plan safe harness changes, diagnose readiness, and archive completed stages with one shared contract core.
defaultPrompt: 为这个项目创建一个可恢复、可验证的 harness。
诊断当前 harness 的缺口，并给出可执行的修复。
归档已完成的 harness 阶段并保留连续性证据。
